lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਦਾ ਰਵੰਨਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau tin kai balihaaranai man har gun sadaa ravan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord in their minds forever. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਰਵਰੁ ਮਾਨ ਸਰੋਵਰੁ ਹੈ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਲਹੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur saravar maan sarovar hai vaddabhaagee purakh lahana |
lines.english: The Guru is like the Mansarovar Lake; only the very fortunate beings find Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਖੋਜਿਆ ਸੇ ਹੰਸੁਲੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਹੰਨਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sevak guramukh khojiaa se hansule naam lahan |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs, the selfless servants, seek out the Guru; the swan-souls feed there on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਨੑਿ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaaeina rang siau guramukh naam lagana |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs meditate on the Naam, and remain linked to the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਲਏਨੑਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhur poorab hovai likhiaa gur bhaanaa man lena |3|
lines.english: Whatever is pre-ordained, accept it as the Will of the Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਘਰੁ ਖੋਜਿਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee ghar khojiaa paaeaa naam nidhaan |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I searched my home, and found the treasure of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa prabh ek hai doojaa avar na koe |
lines.english: There is One God of all; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਵੇਖਾਲਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਨੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur poorai vekhaaliaa prabh aatam raam pachhaan |4|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has shown God to me; I have realized the Lord, the Supreme Soul. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਹੈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਸਭ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh antarajaamee braham hai braham vasai sabh thaae |
lines.english: God is the Inner-knower of all hearts; God dwells in every place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਿਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee man vasai tith ghatt paragatt hoe |5|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the Lord comes to abide in the mind; in the heart of such a one, He is revealed. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਾ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: mandaa kis no aakheeai sabad vekhahu liv laae |6|
lines.english: So who should we call evil? Behold the Word of the Shabad, and lovingly dwell upon it. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਰਾ ਭਲਾ ਤਿਚਰੁ ਆਖਦਾ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਹੈ ਦੁਹੁ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: buraa bhalaa tichar aakhadaa jichar hai duhu maeh |
lines.english: He calls others bad and good, as long as he is in duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਸਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵਸੀ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਏ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa saa prabh bhaavasee jo prabh paae thaae |
lines.english: That is selfless service, which pleases God, and which is approved by God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਬੁਝਿਆ ਏਕਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramukh eko bujhiaa ekas maeh samaae |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukh understands the One and Only Lord; He is absorbed in the One Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੮॥੨॥੪॥੯॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har aaraadhiaa gur charanee chit laae |8|2|4|9|
lines.english: Servant Nanak worships the Lord in adoration; he focuses his consciousness on the Guru's Feet. ||8||2||4||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee asattapadeea mahalaa 4 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Ashtpadheeyaa, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਖਣ ਕੈ ਤਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: darasan har dekhan kai taaee |
lines.english: I long for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਆਣਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਪਹਿ ਆਪੁ ਵੇਚਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: koee aan milaavai meraa preetam piaaraa hau tis peh aap vechaaee |1|
lines.english: If only someone would come, and lead me to meet my Darling Beloved; I would sell myself to him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa kareh taa satigur meleh har har naam dhiaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When the Lord shows Mercy unto me, then I meet the True Guru; I meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਤ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਅਰਾਧੀ ਦੁਖਿ ਭੀ ਤੁਝੈ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: je sukh dehi ta tujheh araadhee dukh bhee tujhai dhiaaee |2|
lines.english: If You will bless me with happiness, then I will worship and adore You. Even in pain, I will meditate on You. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਕਾਟਿ ਕਾਟਿ ਸਭੁ ਅਰਪੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਅਗਨੀ ਆਪੁ ਜਲਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tan man kaatt kaatt sabh arapee vich aganee aap jalaaee |4|
lines.english: I would cut my mind and body apart into pieces, and offer them all to You; I would burn myself in fire. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਭੁਖ ਦੇਹਿ ਤ ਇਤ ਹੀ ਰਾਜਾ ਦੁਖ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੂਖ ਮਨਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: je bhukh dehi ta it hee raajaa dukh vich sookh manaaee |3|
lines.english: Even if You give me hunger, I will still feel satisfied; I am joyful, even in the midst of sorrow. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਖਾ ਫੇਰੀ ਪਾਣੀ ਢੋਵਾ ਜੋ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਸੋ ਖਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: pakhaa feree paanee dtovaa jo deveh so khaaee |5|
lines.english: I wave the fan over You, and carry water for You; whatever You give me, I take. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਗਰੀਬੁ ਢਹਿ ਪਇਆ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak gareeb dteh peaa duaarai har mel laihu vaddiaaee |6|
lines.english: Poor Nanak has fallen at the Lord's Door; please, O Lord, unite me with Yourself, by Your Glorious Greatness. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਕਾਢਿ ਧਰੀ ਚਰਣਾ ਤਲਿ ਸਭ ਧਰਤੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਤ ਪਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: akhee kaadt dharee charanaa tal sabh dharatee fir mat paaee |7|
lines.english: Taking out my eyes, I place them at Your Feet; after travelling over the entire earth, I have come to understand this. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਪਾਸਿ ਬਹਾਲਹਿ ਤਾ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਅਰਾਧੀ ਜੇ ਮਾਰਿ ਕਢਹਿ ਭੀ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: je paas bahaaleh taa tujheh araadhee je maar kadteh bhee dhiaaee |8|
lines.english: If You seat me near You, then I worship and adore You. Even if You beat me and drive me out, I will still meditate on You. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਵਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਤਾ ਕੋਈ ਕਿਹੁ ਆਖਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਵਿਸਰਿਐ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: je tudh val rahai taa koee kihu aakhau tudh visariai mar jaaee |10|
lines.english: If You are on my side, then anyone can say anything. But if I were to forget You, then I would die. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਲੋਕੁ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਤਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਜੇ ਨਿੰਦੈ ਤ ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: je lok salaahe taa teree upamaa je nindai ta chhodd na jaaee |9|
lines.english: If people praise me, the praise is Yours. Even if they slander me, I will not leave You. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਰਿ ਵਾਰਿ ਜਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਪੈ ਪੈਰੀ ਸੰਤ ਮਨਾਈ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: vaar vaar jaaee gur aoopar pai pairee sant manaaee |11|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to my Guru; falling at His Feet, I surrender to the Saintly Guru. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਖੜੁ ਝਾਗੀ ਮੀਹੁ ਵਰਸੈ ਭੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਖਣ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jhakharr jhaagee meehu varasai bhee gur dekhan jaaee |13|
lines.english: Even in violent storms and torrential rain, I go out to catch a glimpse of my Guru. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਿਚਾਰਾ ਭਇਆ ਦਿਵਾਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਤਉ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੈ ਤਾਈ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vichaaraa bheaa divaanaa har tau darasan kai taaee |12|
lines.english: Poor Nanak has gone insane, longing for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਮੁੰਦੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਬਹੁ ਖਾਰਾ ਗੁਰਸਿਖੁ ਲੰਘਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: samund saagar hovai bahu khaaraa gurasikh langh gur peh jaaee |14|
lines.english: Even though the oceans and the salty seas are very vast, the GurSikh will cross over it to get to his Guru. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਹੈ ਮਰਤਾ ਤਿਉ ਸਿਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: jiau praanee jal bin hai marataa tiau sikh gur bin mar jaaee |15|
lines.english: Just as the mortal dies without water, so does the Sikh die without the Guru. ||15||
